items.project_definition: The RESTful interface versioned under /api/v1/ utilizing a standardized response envelope containing data, meta, and errors.
The httpx asynchronous request handler used for validating business logic within the test suite.
The governance section establishing identity verification and permission boundaries.

items.contextual_anchor: III. API Contract and Response Shape
items.project_definition: The governance section defining the structural requirements for interface responses and versioning.
The governance section mandating non-blocking data retrieval and prohibited query patterns.
The mandatory lightweight data-interchange format for all interface responses.
The token-based credential system featuring 15-minute short-term and 7-day long-term expiration cycles.
The timestamp indicating the most recent modification of the technical constitution.
The exclusive abstraction layer used for all persistent storage interactions to prevent raw query execution.
The relational database version 16 utilized for both production and non-mocked testing environments.
The approved runtime environment for all backend implementation work.
The provided Python library for integrating the external transactional email delivery service.
The raw query language whose direct use is strictly forbidden in favor of the mapping layer.
The toolkit used for async database execution and object-relational mapping.
